lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of name is Sleve McDichael?

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Came up with it myself, mate. I'm a bit of a naming specialist you see.

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Aye. Tell you what, mate, you look like a bit of a sailor. Want me to rename your boat for you? Will only cost you a single glass of cider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I not just rename it myself?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to rename my boat.

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Sure thing, mate. Which one do you want me to rename?

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Alright, the price is one glass of cider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have any cider.

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Crying shame, mate. A crying shame indeed.

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Alright, mate, I name your boat... [new boat name]!

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Crying shame, mate. A crying shame indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you end up here?

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Was crew on some fancy merchant ship, but me and Biles went and fell off. Now we live here. It's just the two of us, but it's quite the effective kingdom we've established.

lines.speaker: Sleve McDichael
lines.text: Aye. Biles is the King. He's the one that runs things. Meanwhile, I handle the naming of everything.
